query:
UPDATE pricing_config SET 
  basePrice = CASE 
    WHEN vehicleType = 'moto' THEN 500
    WHEN vehicleType = 'carro' THEN 800
    WHEN vehicleType = 'van' THEN 1200
  END,
  pricePerKm = CASE 
    WHEN vehicleType = 'moto' THEN 180
    WHEN vehicleType = 'carro' THEN 250
    WHEN vehicleType = 'van' THEN 350
  END,
  pricePerMinute = CASE 
    WHEN vehicleType = 'moto' THEN 20
    WHEN vehicleType = 'carro' THEN 30
    WHEN vehicleType = 'van' THEN 40
  END,
  minimumPrice = CASE 
    WHEN vehicleType = 'moto' THEN 600
    WHEN vehicleType = 'carro' THEN 1000
    WHEN vehicleType = 'van' THEN 1500
  END
WHERE vehicleType IN ('moto', 'carro', 'van');
